hooks.command: python3 -c " import sys, json, re data = json.load(sys.stdin) f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '') or '' if not (('/backend/' in f or '/frontend/src/' in f) and 'App.jsx' not in f): sys.exit(0) app = '/home/user/sachoki/frontend/src/App.jsx' text = open(app).read() m = re.search(r'v(\\d+)\\.(\\d+)(?:\\.(\\d+))?(?=)', text) if not m: sys.exit(0) major, minor, patch = m.group(1), m.group(2), m.group(3) new_patch = int(patch) + 1 if patch else 1 new_ver = f'v{major}.{minor}.{new_patch}' open(app, 'w').write(text.replace(m.group(0), new_ver, 1)) " 2>/dev/null || true
